project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript + Tailwind CSS, deployed to Cloudflare Pages
build_system: Next.js CLI via npm scripts, deployed with @cloudflare/next-on-pages
build_command: Cannot run (no npm install possible in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY sandbox)
test_command: Cannot run (no npm install possible in INTEGRATIONS_ONLY sandbox)
verification_instructions: AST validation via TypeScript compiler checks not possible without node_modules. Verify by reading modified files for syntax correctness and pushing to GitHub for Cloudflare build verification.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no npm install, no Docker, no external network. Code changes committed and pushed via GitHub power tool for Cloudflare to build.
contribution_requirements: Push directly to main branch. Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys from main.
key_patterns: Components in src/components/, pages in src/app/, site config in src/lib/site.ts, SEO helpers in src/lib/seo.ts, products data in src/lib/products.ts, types in src/lib/types.ts. All Amazon buttons use AmazonButton component from src/components/ui/AmazonButton.tsx. WhatsApp is a standalone component imported in layout.tsx.
directory_structure: src/app/ contains pages (about/, brand/, contact/, products/, privacy-policy/, terms-of-service/). src/components/ has UI components, sections/, forms/, ui/ subdirs. src/lib/ has config, product data, SEO utils, types.
